description_long: This modern house features a flat and gable roof combination, with a clean, geometric design and a mix of white and wood-textured exterior finishes. The front facade includes a large garage with a wooden overhang, a paved driveway, and a prominent main entrance with a wide door and horizontal window. The property is enclosed by a low white wall and includes a landscaped backyard with green lawn, trees, and outdoor seating. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with horizontal strips and large panes providing ample natural light. The rear of the house opens to a spacious garden area, while the side elevations show minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional, linear forms. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing simplicity and integration with outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a mix of flat and gable roofs, wood and white finishes, a garage, and a landscaped yard enclosed by a white wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage with wooden overhang, paved driveway, and partial view of the backyard with trees.
description_view_1: Rear-side view highlighting the flat roof section, backyard lawn, trees, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the large garden area, white boundary wall, and rear windows with a focus on outdoor space.
description_view_3: Side view featuring the wooden garage, side windows, and a clear view of the backyard with outdoor furniture.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with horizontal strips and large panes
attribute_entryway_design: Wide main door with horizontal window, no steps, sheltered by a wooden overhang, minimalistic and integrated with garage facade
